reviews.comment:
Estación con precios razonables y poca gente generalmente. Tiene oficinas del ACA. Buena atención siempre.

(Translated by Google)
A station with reasonable prices and usually not crowded. It has ACA offices. Always good service.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion, ya sea por los playeros, seguridad o la gente del maxiquioso, muy educados y con mucha paciencia con nosotros los clientes

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, whether from the beach attendants, security or the staff at the convenience store, very polite and very patient with us customers.

reviews.comment:
La verdad que la atención recibida y la buena voluntad para solucionar mis problemas mecánicos y proveerme de nafta fue EXCELENTE

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that the attention I received and the good will to solve my mechanical problems and provide me with gasoline was EXCELLENT.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3eU9qbnZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
NO LA RECOMIENDO. Si vas, controla que te carguen lo que pediste, porque yo tuve una mala experiencia. Le pedí que cargara $400 y cargó $300.- con lo cual me privó de hacer uso de la promoción.

(Translated by Google)
I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT. If you go, make sure they load the amount you requested, because I had a bad experience. I asked for $400 and they only loaded $300, which prevented me from using the promotion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3amFtY3FRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Referente al taller mecánico,  buena atención   pero ponen repuestos de cuarta, lamentablemente muy mala experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
Regarding the mechanic's workshop, the service was good but they use substandard parts; unfortunately, it was a very bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbThyNDNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Llevé el auto a boxes para cambio de filtro, aceite, etc...mientras esperaba leí un libro y tomé una lágrima con facturitas...para mi sorpresa eran ricas y frescas...
Todos el personal muy amable y con buena predisposición.

(Translated by Google)
I took my car to the pits for a filter and oil change, etc. While I waited, I read a book and had a pastry with some croissants. To my surprise, they were delicious and fresh. All the staff were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRZ2VIZmRBEAE

reviews.comment:
A pesar de tener que hacer cola para cargar nafta siempre me trataron de primera

(Translated by Google)
Despite having to queue to fill up with gas, I was always treated like royalty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncnEzRl9BRRAB
